sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ المَدْرَسَةُ تُنَظِّمُ مَسْرَحِيَّةً صَغِيرَةً كُلَّ عَامٍ.
sentences.translation: Škola je svake godine organizovala malu pozorišnu predstavu.
sentences.translationEn: The school organized a small play every year.

sentences.translation: Nastavnica je odabrala neke učenike za glumu.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher chose some students to act.

sentences.arabic: حَفِظَ كُلُّ طَالِبٍ دَوْرَهُ وَتَدَرَّبَ عَلَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki učenik je zapamtio svoju ulogu i uvježbavao je.
sentences.translationEn: Each student memorized their role and practiced it.

sentences.translation: Predstava je bila odlična i svi su se smijali.
sentences.translationEn: The play was wonderful and everyone laughed.

sentences.translation: Roditelji su se radosno pljeskom pohvalili svojoj djeci.
sentences.translationEn: The parents clapped for their children with great joy.
